title: Avoid creating session cookies from untrusted input
description: Creating session cookies from untrusted input can allow attackers to hijack sessions or inject malicious data. Always generate session identifiers securely and never use user-provided values for session cookies. This helps prevent session fixation and other security vulnerabilities.
recommendation: Generate session cookies using secure, server-side mechanisms. Never use user input to set or influence session identifiers.

checks.message: Ensure cookies have secure flags (HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite) to prevent session hijacking.
